subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! This is the cycle of the All-Merciful and the age of the All-Glorious; this is the divine dispensation and the heavenly century [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی دور رحمانی است و کور سبحانی عصر ربانیست و قرن یزدانی زمان
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and mercy, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
